title: poa tanfiljewii
intro: Poa tanfiljewii, also known as Tanfiljew's Meadow-grass or Tanfiljew's Fescue, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic and expectorant effects, which help to relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The health benefits of Poa tanfiljewii include its ability to calm the nervous system and reduce inflammation, making it a potential treatment for anxiety and arthritis. Herbal preparations of Poa tanfiljewii can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
